executive_summary: The commercial HVAC services sector shows stable demand driven by recurring maintenance contracts and regulatory-driven retrofits. Multiples are compressed for very small deals but expand with scale and recurring revenue.
value_drivers: Geographic footprint and regional regulatory exposure
Quality of installer teams and documented processes

ideal_buyers.name: Platform HVAC PE funds
ideal_buyers.rationale: Look for roll-up opportunities with add-on appetite

ideal_buyers.name: Strategic facilities service providers
ideal_buyers.rationale: Want to expand service coverage and add recurring contracts
